# required phase-2 storage schema fragments
CREATE TABLE job_submissions
CREATE TABLE sources
CREATE TABLE source_sets
CREATE TABLE source_set_items
CREATE TABLE jobs
CREATE TABLE job_executions
CREATE TABLE job_artifacts
CREATE TABLE job_events
CREATE TABLE webhook_deliveries
source_kind = 'youtube_url'
source_kind IN ('uploaded_file', 'telegram_upload')
input_kind IN ('single_source', 'combined_upload', 'combined_telegram', 'batch_transcription', 'agent_run')
source_label text NULL
source_label_version text NULL
metadata jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb
lineage jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX source_set_items_source_set_source_label_unique_idx
delivery_strategy = 'webhook'
delivery_strategy = 'polling'
status <> 'cancel_requested'
status IN ('queued', 'running', 'cancel_requested', 'succeeded')
job_type IN ('agent_run', 'report', 'deep_research')
finished_at IS NULL AND outcome IS NULL
finished_at IS NOT NULL AND outcome IN ('succeeded', 'failed', 'canceled')
job_event_id uuid NOT NULL UNIQUE REFERENCES job_events(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX jobs_canonical_child_unique_idx
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX job_executions_active_job_unique_idx
